title: repl + make verbs
manager: The `repl` and `make` verbs — an interactive read-eval-print loop for driving a machine step by step at the command line, and `make` for constructing instances from factories. These are the hands-on tools for exploring and operating machines: `repl` is how you poke at a machine live to understand it, `make` is how you instantiate one from a factory without writing any host code.
cs: `repl` interactive loop + `make` factory-construction verb (§25); jssm twins #630/#8; the interactive-operation surface.
